hero_subtitle: SFTY supports government teams with on-premise deployment, stringent data sovereignty, audit logs, and phased procurement to enable trusted national digital asset supervision.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Data control gaps slow sovereign supervision
problem_description: When sensitive supervisory data is stored without clear governance or local control, governments face delays in secure access and audit readiness. This creates uncertainty around evidence integrity, access permissions and compliance with national data sovereignty requirements.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY organizes supervisory data, user roles, audit logs and evidence retention within a controlled sovereign environment to enable compliant, phased rollout and seamless integration with government systems.
workflow_title: From regulatory update to controlled deployment
workflow_description: SFTY enables government teams to map regulatory changes into internal rules with role-based access and audit log control for secure sovereign deployment.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. A sovereign data layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides regulators a secure, auditable supervisory layer that connects fragmented data, enforces governance, preserves evidence, and supports sovereign compliance workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY delivers a secure supervisory layer with controlled access, evidence-grade logging and procurement-safe deployment tailored for government infrastructure and phased rollout.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support sovereign data sovereignty requirements
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how role-based access controls protect supervisory data
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit logs preserve evidence-grade supervisory records
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe phased deployment options for government compliance environments
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for government regulators?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps government regulators connect licensing, wallet, transaction, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and risk data into one secure supervisory operating layer for digital asset markets.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support sovereign deployment?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports on-premise, private cloud, or controlled environments with role-based access, audit logs and secure data handling to meet sovereign deployment and governance requirements.
faq_3_question: How is supervisory evidence preserved in SFTY?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves audit logs, decision records and case history enabling authorized teams to review supervisory actions and maintain defensible oversight workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing government systems?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY supports modular integration with public-sector registries, reporting systems and existing supervisory workflows to fit government IT environments and procurement needs.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace analytics or compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing analytics and compliance providers by connecting their outputs into structured cases, workflows and reports without replacing underlying tools.
final_title: Review secure sovereign deployment with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports on-premise deployment, role-based access, audit logs and phased integration for government supervision.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
